form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 8 at this track on March 15 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Unchartered with 52kg at $26.20. Second run from a spell made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on March 31 over 1900m, 7 len behind Lion Icardi with 54kg at $5. Capable of a better showing. Respect.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at this track on February 17 over 1400m, 74 len behind Good Wiew Glory carrying 54kg at $25.90. Previously second-up of 8 at Yesiloba on September 30 over 1300m, 11 len behind Serahira with 59kg at $5.40. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Sanliurfa January 26 over 1400m, 43 len behind Kizim Rabia carrying 54kg at $3.25. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 6 len win. Diyarbakir October 4 over 1200m defeating King Ancestor with 54kg at $1.80. Can go on to better things this campaign.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd in a small field at Elazig on April 1 over 1500m, 13 len behind Jazzmaster with 55kg at $3. The start before that 6th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 23 over 1200m, 7 len behind Come And See carrying 55.5kg at $9.30. Working up to a win. Worth following.
